fileimporter-desc: Soo dejin fudud oo faylal ah oo laga keeno goobaha kale
fileimporter-help-banner-text:
'''Ka soo dejinta wiki-yada kale''' #Hubi oo wax ka beddel cinwaanka iyo macluumaadka faylka hoos ku qoran. #Dooro haddii aad rabto FileImporter inuu hagaajiyo wiki-ga asalka ah adigoo ku daraya template-ka [//en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Template:Now_Commons NowCommons] faylka asalka ah. (Haddii aad leedahay xuquuq admin, waxaad sidoo kale tirtiri kartaa faylka asalka ah.) #Guji '''{{int:fileimporter-import}}''' si aad faylka ugu nuquliso {{SITENAME}}. Macluumaadka shatiga si aad u eegto, fadlan akhri siyaasadda [[Project:Licensing|bulshada]] ee {{SITENAME}}.
Si aad u hesho tilmaamo faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan sida loo isticmaalo FileImporter, eeg [//www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Extension:FileImporter Bogga Caawinta].
tag-fileimporter-description: Dib u eegisyada iyo farriimaha diiwaanka ee lagu daray ka dib marka laga soo dejiyo wiki kale
tag-fileimporter-imported-description: Dib u eegisyada laga soo dejiyay wiki kale
fileimporter-mediawiki-api-notfound: Lama helin MediaWiki API-ga ee laga keenayo SourceUrl.
fileimporter-api-badinfo: Macluumaad sawir ama dib u eegis khaldan ayaa laga helay API-ga.
fileimporter-api-failedtogetinfo: Lama helin macluumaadka faylka ee laga soo qaaday: $1
fileimporter-api-nopagesreturned: Ma jiraan bogag uu soo celiyay API-ga fog.
fileimporter-api-toomanyrevisions: Dib u eegisyo aad u badan ayaa laga helay API-ga, lama soo dejin karo.
fileimporter-api-failedtofindapi: Lama helin goobta API-ga ee laga ogaado: $1. $2 $3
fileimporter-cantparseurl: Lama fasihi karo URL-ka la bixiyay: $1
fileimporter-cantimporturl: Lama soo dejin karo URL-ka la bixiyay
fileimporter-cantimportfromsharedrepo: Lama soo dejin karo faylasha aan dhab ahaan ku jirin $1, balse lagu hayo kayd wadaag ah.
fileimporter-cantimportmissingfile: Lama soo dejin karo fayl maqan.
fileimporter-cantimportfilehidden: Lama soo dejin karo faylka sababtoo ah ugu yaraan mid ka mid ah dib u eegisyadiisa waa la qariyay.
fileimporter-cantimportfileinvalid: Faylkan (ama nuqulkiisii hore) waxa ku jira waxyaabo aan la aqbali karin sababo amni awgood: $1
fileimporter-warningabusefilter: [//so.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Edit_filter Filter otomaatig ah] ayaa ogaaday tafatir laga yaabo inuusan wax tar lahayn oo ku jira taariikhda dib-u-eegista faylkan. Hal ama in ka badan oo dib-u-eegis ah ayaa sababi kara tan; mid kasta hoos ayaa lagu muujiyay digniintiisa. Guji soo gudbi mar kale si aad u iska indhatirto digniinaha oo aad u sii waddo soo dejinta.
fileimporter-badnamespace: Meel-magac khaldan oo dib u eegis qoraal ah ayaa la bixiyay.
fileimporter-badtoken: Kalfadhigaagu hadda ma shaqaynayo. Fadlan dib u billow soo dejinta.
fileimporter-badimporthash: Hash-ka soo dejinta ma is waafaqsana. Fadlan dib u billow soo dejinta.
fileimporter-filenameerror-default: Waxaa jira cilad aan la aqoon oo ku saabsan magaca faylkaaga.
fileimporter-filenameerror-illegal: Magaca faylka aad isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso ma aha mid ansax ah, tusaale ahaan sababtoo ah waxa ku jira xarfo aan la oggolayn.
fileimporter-filenameerror-toolong: Magaca faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso waa mid aad u dheer.
fileimporter-filenameerror-notallowed: Waxaad isku dayaysaa inaad soo dejiso fayl leh kordhin $1. Faylasha leh kordhintan laguma oggola wiki-kan. Kordhinnada la oggol yahay waa: $2.
fileimporter-filenameerror-automaticchan: Magaca faylka si otomaatig ah ayaa looga beddelay "$1" loona beddelay "$2"
fileimporter-filenameerror-nosourceexten: Magaca faylka isha ma laha kordhin.
fileimporter-filenameerror-noplannedexte: Magaca faylka la qorsheeyay ma laha kordhin.
fileimporter-filenameerror-missmatchexte: Kordhinta faylka bartilmaameedka ma waafaqsana kordhinta faylka asalka ah.
fileimporter-filenameerror-protected: Magaca faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso waa mid la ilaaliyay.
fileimporter-localtitleexists: Magaca faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso hore ayaa looga isticmaalayaa wiki-kan.
fileimporter-sourcetitleexists: Magaca faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso hore ayaa looga isticmaalayaa wiki-ga isha.
fileimporter-illegalfilenamechars: Magaca faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad ku soo dejiso waxa ku jira xarfo aan ansax ahayn.
fileimporter-duplicatefilesdetected: Faylka aad hadda isku dayayso inaad soo dejiso hore ayuu uga jiraa wiki-kan.
fileimporter-textrevisions: $1/$2 {{PLURAL:$2|dib u eegis|dib u eegisyo}} bog ayaa laga soo dejin doonaa taariikhda dib u eegista.
fileimporter-filerevisions: $1/$2 {{PLURAL:$2|nuqul fayl|nuqullo fayl}} ayaa la soo dejin doonaa.
fileimporter-previewnote: Tani waa hordhaca faylka la doonayo in la soo dejiyo. Fadlan si faahfaahsan u hubi bogga ka hor inta aan la soo dejin.
fileimporter-cleanup-text: Waxaad ku wargelin kartaa wiki-ga isha in faylkan lagu soo dejiyay {{SITENAME}}. Taas waxaa lagu sameeyaa adigoo ku daraya template-ka {{$1}} bogga faylka asalka ah adiga oo isticmaalaya magacaaga.
fileimporter-cleanup-checkboxlabel: Calaamadee faylka wiki-ga isha inuu lagu soo dejiyay {{SITENAME}}
fileimporter-cleanup-summary: Faylkan hadda wuxuu ku yaal {{SITENAME}} saacadda $1 (waxaa loo wareejiyay FileImporter).
fileimporter-cleanup-failed: Si otomaatig ah uma suurtoobin in wax laga beddelo wiki-ga isha.
fileimporter-delete-text: Waxaad haysataa xuquuqda aad ku tirtiri karto faylka wiki-ga isha. Haddii aad rabto in FileImporter uu faylka ku tirtiro magacaaga, dooro ikhtiyaarkan:
fileimporter-delete-checkboxlabel: Ku tirtir faylka wiki-ga isha adigoo isticmaalaya magacayga
fileimporter-delete-summary: Faylkan hadda wuxuu ku yaal {{SITENAME}} saacadda $1 (waxaa loo wareejiyay FileImporter).
fileimporter-delete-failed: Faylka si otomaatig ah loogama tirtiri karo $1. Fadlan ku noqo [$2 faylka asalka ah] oo gacanta ku tirtir.
fileimporter-revision-removed-text: Qoraal qarsoon oo uu FileImporter ka saaray.
fileimporter-revision-removed-comment: Faallo qarsoon oo uu FileImporter ka saaray.
fileimporter-filemissinginrevision: Lama soo dejin karo faylka sababtoo ah ugu yaraan mid ka mid ah dib u eegisyadiisa waxaa ka maqan fayl sawir.
fileimporter-filetoolarge: Faylka {{PLURAL:$1|aad|$1 fayl}} ee aad hadda isku dayayso inaad soo dejiso {{PLURAL:$1|wuu ka badan yahay|way ka badan yihiin}} xadka cabbirka faylka ee soo dejintu ay qaadi karto.
fileimporter-import-wait: Soo dejintu waxay qaadan kartaa dhowr daqiiqo.
fileimporter-add-unknown-template: Faylka waa la soo dejiyay. Si loo caddeeyo in faylku hadda ku yaal {{SITENAME}}, fadlan ku noqo [$1 faylka asalka ah] oo ku dar tusmada ku habboon, badanaa {{NowCommons}}.
fileimporter-add-specific-template: Faylka waa la soo dejiyay. Si loo caddeeyo in faylku hadda ku yaal {{SITENAME}}, fadlan ku noqo [$1 faylka asalka ah] oo ku dar tusmadaan: {{$2|$3}}.
fileimporter-commonshelper-retrieval-fai: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la hubinayay faylasha xanniban.
fileimporter-commonshelper-missing-confi: Nasiib darro, soo dejinta faylasha laga keenayo wiki-ga isha ($1) weli lama suurtagelin sababtoo ah ma jiro habayn loogu talagalay wiki-ga liiska faylasha [$2 liiska faylka qaabeynta]. Si aad u hesho macluumaad ku saabsan sida loo sameeyo fayl habayn ah oo wiki-ga ah, eeg bogga dukumentiga FileImporter ee [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:FileImporter/Configuration_format bogga dukumentiyada faylka qaabeynta].
fileimporter-commonshelper-parsing-faile: Bogga habaynta wiki-gaaga ($1) waa mid aan dhammaystirnayn. Fadlan hubi inuu ku jiro qaybta "$2".
fileimporter-file-contains-blocked-categ: Faylkan lama soo dejin karo {{SITENAME}} sababtoo ah waxaa lagu calaamadeeyay $1. {{SITENAME}} ma oggola faylasha noocan ah. Tani mararka qaar waa la xallin karaa, balse badanaa waxay ka dhigan tahay in faylku aanu ku habboonayn. Fadlan la tasho [[Project:Licensing|siyaasadda bulshada ee {{SITENAME}} iyo bogagga wadahadalka ee shatiyeynta]].
fileimporter-file-missing-required-templ: Faylkan lama soo dejin karo {{SITENAME}} sababtoo ah kuma jiro shati la jaanqaadaya. {{SITENAME}} ma oggola faylasha noocan ah. Tani mararka qaar waa la xallin karaa, balse badanaa waxay ka dhigan tahay in faylku aanu ku habboonayn. Fadlan la tasho [[Project:Licensing|siyaasadda bulshada ee {{SITENAME}} iyo bogagga wadahadalka ee shatiyeynta]].
fileimporter-category-encouragement: Faylasha ku jira {{SITENAME}} waa in la kala saaraa. Tani waxay fududaynaysaa in la helo. Waxaad beddeli kartaa qaybaha faylkan adigoo wax ka beddelaya macluumaadka faylka ee boggan.
fileimporter-auto-replacements-summary: $1 otomaatig {{PLURAL:$1|isbeddel|isbeddello}} oo lagu sameeyay templates {{PLURAL:$1|ayaa|leedahay}} la sameeyay
fileimporter-input-page-info-text: Wax badan ka baro adigoo booqanaya [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Help:Extension:FileImporter bogga caawinta].
fileimporter-no-script-warning: JavaScript ma taageersana ama waa naafo biraawsarkaaga. File Importer wuxuu ku tiirsan yahay JavaScript si uu u shaqeeyo.
fileimporter-cdx-diff-failed: Wax baa khaldamay markii la soo helayay isbeddellada. Fadlan isku day mar kale goor dambe.
